title: Principal Frontend Developer at Siemens India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Siemens India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
